title: Keyword ranking dropped 15+ positions
detail: Keyword 'life coach bangalore' dropped from position #4 to #19 overnight (Apr 9–10). Possible causes: competitor content update, Google algorithm flux, or page speed regression. Immediate investigation recommended.

title: GBP listing suspended — action required
detail: The Google Business Profile for LifeCircle (lifecircle.in) has been flagged for review. Status changed to 'Suspended' at 03:22 AM IST. Login to Google Business and submit a reinstatement request immediately.

title: 3 new reviews unanswered for >48 hours
detail: Reviews from Amit S. (3★), Neha R. (5★), and Suresh P. (2★) have not received a response. Google recommends responding within 24 hours to maintain profile health. Approval queue has suggested responses ready.

title: Content publishing quota at 80%
detail: WordPress REST API monthly write quota is at 80% (40/50 posts). At current pace, the limit will be hit by Apr 18. Consider upgrading the hosting plan or pausing scheduled content for the remainder of the month.

title: Rich result errors detected in Search Console
detail: Google Search Console reports 6 FAQ schema validation errors on /services pages. Items affected: missing 'acceptedAnswer' on 2 FAQ items, incorrect nesting on /services/therapy. Schema regeneration queued.

title: Weekly ranking report ready
detail: Average position improved from 18.4 to 16.1 this week (+2.3). Top mover: 'wellness coaching online' jumped 8 spots to #11. Full report available in the weekly digest.

title: GBP photo count below recommended threshold
detail: LifeCircle GBP currently has 4 photos. Google recommends a minimum of 10 for competitive local listings. Consider uploading facility photos, team headshots, and session images.
